{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (adaptive replication), shows where the draft drifts from it (static policies), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.4": "Maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },

    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 1,

  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (adaptive replication), shows where the draft drifts from it (static policies), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.4: Maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
